text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tosen Jordan's toenail is in horrible condition.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the possibility of having to skip the Satsuki
Sho dawns on us, she pleads with me to let her
run.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She claims that if she can't, she'll quit running
altogether. She doesn't care what happens after
the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I realize the extent of her determination. We
decide to continue working towards the Satsuki
Sho while we treat her toenail.
